ofm.title: OnlyFans is cracking down hard
ofm.summary: 2026 biometric verification, AI detection tools, and 30-40% revenue penalties for violators. The platforms are fighting back against AI-only models. [b9-agency.com](https://b9-agency.com/blog/how-to-create-ai-onlyfans-model-2026)

ofm.title: DMs are still king
ofm.summary: 60-70% of OF income comes from DMs — and current AI chatbots can't match human emotional connection. Human-in-the-loop remains the winning model. [b9-agency.com](https://b9-agency.com/blog/how-to-create-ai-onlyfans-model-2026)

ofm.title: Fanvue is the AI-creator platform to watch
ofm.summary: Just raised $22M Series A, hit $100M run rate, and adding AI agents for fan interactions. 20% platform fee on $12.50 average subscription. Major mainstream creators expected Q1 2026. [businesswire.com](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260112458975/en/AI-Powered-Creator-Monetisation-Platform-Fanvue-Hits-%24100m-Run-Rate-and-Raises-%2422m-Series-A-Investment)

ofm.title: AI influencer economics are real
ofm.summary: Aitana Lopez (250k followers) earns $1,000+ per post. Top AI influencers reportedly earning $2M/year. [success.com](https://www.success.com/how-ai-influencers-generate-millions-per-year)

ofm.title: OnlyMonster & Supercreator dominate OF management
ofm.summary: OnlyMonster grew to market leader in one year through beta tools alone. AI chat assistance is the differentiator. [onlymonster.ai](https://onlymonster.ai/)

tools.title: OpenClaw v2026.3.22 just dropped (March 23)
tools.summary: 45+ new features, secrets system, browser control, PDF tools, 13 breaking changes. This moves it from "demo setup" to production-ready for real workflows. [bibigpt.co](https://bibigpt.co/en/blog/posts/openclaw-v2026322-release-update-breaking-changes-guide-2026-en)

tools.title: Claude Code Hooks system
tools.summary: Now supports workflow automation hooks (PreToolUse, etc) with exit code controls (0=allow, 2=block). Can automate git worktrees, approval flows, and multi-step dev pipelines. [dev.to](https://dev.to/serenitiesai/claude-code-hooks-guide-2026-automate-your-ai-coding-workflow-dde)

tools.title: CrewAI Studio
tools.summary: Multi-agent platform now lets non-devs build agent crews with Gmail, Teams, Notion, HubSpot, Salesforce, Slack integrations. Visual builder for business workflows. [crewai.com](https://crewai.com/)

tools.title: Latenode MCP for cross-system agents
tools.summary: Connects Claude to real business apps as callable tools. Agents can trigger actions across systems, update records, send messages, move data — without manual wiring. [reddit.com](https://www.reddit.com/r/ClaudeAI/comments/1rkkozb/anyone_else_using_claude_to_build_automation/)

tools.title: AI agent automation tiers
tools.summary: 2026 winners are Workbeaver and Manus/Genspark for true time-saving automation. Meeting assistants (Fathom) + automation agents are the productivity stack. [reddit.com](https://www.reddit.com/r/automation/comments/1qj355h/best-ai_tools_and_automation_agents_in_2026_that/)

market.title: Puerto Escondido real estate heating up
market.summary: Strong fundamentals entering 2026 — growing international/domestic demand, improved infrastructure, diversifying guest base supporting year-round occupancy. Entry window still open but closing as infrastructure drives appreciation. [realestate.puerto-escondido.mx](https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/puerto-escondido-real-estate-forecast-next-5-years)

market.title: Puerto Escondido airport expanding
market.summary: Additional Canadian and US flight connections planned for 2026. Cabo/Puerto Vallarta saw dramatic property value surges after direct international routes — same pattern expected here. [realestate.puerto-escondido.mx](https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/puerto-escondido-airport-how-proximity-is-reshaping-the-local-real-estate-market)

market.title: Rammed earth construction advancing
market.summary: Earth USA 2026 conference (Sept 18-20, Santa Fe). Prefabricated rammed earth blocks gaining traction for quality control and reduced construction time. Digital compaction workflows now exist (Rhino/Grasshopper toolpaths). [earthusa.org](https://www.earthusa.org)

market.title: Tulum ATV rental competition
market.summary: Multiple players in market including tulumatvrental.com claiming "no competitors" (bold). Lagoon Company needs to monitor TripAdvisor rankings and Google Ads competition. [tulumatvrental.com](https://www.tulumatvrental.com/)

market.title: Puerto Escondido rental market maturing
market.summary: Diversifying beyond surf tourists to digital nomads, families, and international buyers. Year-round occupancy more robust than prior years. Opportunity for boutique hospitality plays. [realestate.puerto-escondido.mx](https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/puerto-escondido-rental-market-analysis-2026-occupancy-trends-investment-outlook)
